title: 秋華賞の後に・この気持ちを歌う

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I place well in the race! Now that I get to sing Brilliant Phantasia on stage, I feel on top of the world! I'm advancing towards becoming my dream princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To all my fans! I'm so glad that you enjoyed my
performance tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm riding this great momentum to the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup! I'll take them out with a
Princess☆Choke Hold!
